Welcome to Mafia Game 314 (Newbie Game 118): Pi Mafia

Important Rules:
Do not edit or delete posts
Do not post during night
Do not post if you are dead or if you are not in the game
Do not talk about anything related to this game outside this thread
Read all the rules!


Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.7: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.8: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.9: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#00FF00), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.10: Confirm your participation in the game by making a post stating the important rules
  • Voting/Elimination Procedures
    • 2.1: Post votes in code tags in the format 
      [code]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎code]

      Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. A proper vote looks like 
      Vote: fdas
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang/elimination to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post 
      Vote: No Hang
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format 
      Vote: Unvote

      An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no player has been hanged, the amount of votes required for a Hang or a No Hang will be reduced by 1. The vote threshold will reduce by 1 vote every 24 hours after this. For example, if there are 8 players alive in the game, 5 votes will be required to hang someone and 4 votes are required for a no hang. Once the deadline passes, 4 votes will be sufficient to hang someone and 3 votes are sufficient for a no hang. 24 hours after the deadline, 3 votes will be sufficient to hang someone and 2 votes are sufficient for a no hang.
    • 2.10: If the vote threshold is decreased and two or more options have both reached the threshold required, then the game will enter tiebreak. During tiebreak, votes can continue to be changed. If at any point in time, only one option has enough votes to meet the threshold required for the option to be enacted, day will immediately end. Or, if any option gains votes and now exceeds the vote threshold by an amount of votes strictly greater than the amount of votes any other option exceeds their vote threshold by, that option will win and day will immediately end. If 24 hours have passed since tiebreak has begun, and the votes are still deadlocked, there will be no hang.
    • 2.11: After an option has won the vote, it will become twilight and players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 168 hours (1 week). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 168 hours has elapsed.
    • 3.4: The night deadline will be 72 hours after night begins.
    • 3.5: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.6: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • 3.7: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.8: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.11: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
    • 3.12: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I fdas am the moderator of Mafia Game 314
    • 5.2: Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • 5.3: Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • 5.4: Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.5: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount
    • 5.6: If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 24 hours, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Setup
This game will use the Matrix6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Three of the roles will be generated randomly by picking a row or column from the matrix. Then one Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies are added to maintain a 2:7 mafia:town ratio. The six possible setups are:
1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons


Role PMs
Quote:
You are 22/7 (Vanilla Townie).

You are one of the most common approximations of pi. Accurate to two decimal places (3.14), Archimedes is famously credited with deriving it in around 250 BC, although he may not have been the first to use that approximation. You think that using pi should be simple and easy, just like 22/7, and that using a long, literally endless string of digits for calculations is pointless. You seek to simplify geometry and rest of math altogether.

You win when all of the true values of pi (Mafia) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are , (Town Cop).

You are a very widely used approximation of pi. With accuracy of 52 decimal places, you boast the ability to calculate the circumference of the observable universe with a margin of error smaller than an atom. Since you are very close to an infinite number of decimal places, you are able to figure out who is actually equivalent to pi.

Each night you may visit a player and determine if they are a true value of pi.

You win when all of the true values of pi (Mafia) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are 3 (Town Doctor). As the value of pi recognized in the bible (1 Kings 7:23 describing a circular pool with a diameter of 10 cubits and a circumference of 30 cubits) you command significant moral authority. Each night, you may choose to shield a player from being exposed as a false value of pi. You may not shield yourself two nights in a row.

You win when all of the true values of pi (Mafia) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are 85910/27346 (Town Tracker). You pride yourself on having all of the digits. You may have collected all ten digits, but you are still hungry for more math and more information, and your collection allows you to keep tabs on each digit and where they go.

Every night you may target someone and learn who they visited.

You win when all of the true values of pi (Mafia) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are (Town Jailkeeper). Square roots. You love square roots. You ARE square roots. You might only be accurate to 5 decimal places, but you believe you show off a lot of flair with your square roots. Since you have so many square roots, you can trap others in them, ensuring that they can't break out because of how thick the walls of your square root jail are.

Each night you may choose someone to put in jail. That person will be unable to perform any actions that night and nightkills attempting to target that person will be blocked.

You win when all of the true values of pi (Mafia) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are 3.2 (Town 1 Shot Bulletproof). You are the value of pi as laid out in a bill passed by the Indiana House of Representatives. With this pseudo legal recognition, you are able to resist an attempt to disprove your status as pi a single time.

You win when all of the true values of pi (Mafia) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are (Mafia Goon). You are the exact value of pi. Together with your partner (), you must eliminate all of the impersonators who falsely pretend to be pi. Each night, you may decide with your partner on who to prove is a false value of pi, removing them from the pi conference. You may speak with your partner here.

You win when all of the false values of pi (Town) have been eliminated.
Quote:
You are 4 (Mafia Roleblocker). You are the value of pi in the metric space defined by the distance function . This distance is known as taxicab distance, or Manhattan distance in reference to how cars must travel along the grid of roads in a city. The distance is therefore the sum of the vertical distance and horizontal distance between two points. In taxicab geometry, a circle with center c and radius 1 is the set of all points that are a distance of 1 around the point c. This circle will have circumference 8, as such the value of pi is 4. On each night, you may choose to target a player and get them stuck in traffic, preventing them from taking any actions during the night.

Together with your partner (), you must eliminate all of the impersonators who falsely pretend to be pi. Each night, you may decide with your partner on who to prove is a false value of pi, removing them from the pi conference. You may speak with your partner here.

You win when all of the false values of pi (Town) have been eliminated.


Alive (3)
NDMath
BananaBall00
Goldenjammer741


Dead(6)
orangebear (Vanilla Townie)
Shadow_Sniper (Mafia Goon)
violetmx12 (Town Cop)
ad333 (Vanilla Townie)
sweetbird108 (Town Doctor)
Sachuhere hypersock_ (Vanilla Townie)


Events
Day 1: orangebear hanged
Night 1: No one died
Day 2: Shadow_Sniper hanged
Night 2: violetmx12 died
Day 3: ad333 hanged
Night 3: sweetbird108 died
Day 4: No one was hanged
Night 4: hypersock_ died


PM Prods
 


Warnings
 


9 numbers gathered for the annual pi conference. However, not all of them were true values of pi. Many of them were imposters, mere approximations of pi who had gathered here to seize control of the pi conference and impose their vision of pi on the world. Realizing this, the true values of pi began plotting to expel all of the false values of pi from the conference. They had to move quickly, before the approximations of pi found out who they were and stopped their efforts.

Do not post until this line is crossed out

Day 1 begins at 22:00:00 EST 26 February 2026.

post_rendered:
It has been a bit since I last actually played in a newbie game.

Everyone should make sure to read the rules post.
If you have questions about anything you can ask here or to fdas in your pm.

Another note that's not in the op since it's a rather important bit of strategy instead of a rule;
The only scenarios you should claim what your role is are:
A) you are very likely to die otherwise (& this will not apply to anyone until very late into the day phase)
B) you have critical information (ie cop with a guilty result)
C) we have agreed to massclaim (in newbie games, this typically happens day 3.

post_rendered:
hammer doesn't have to be before deadline LOL
the most simple and broad definition of it is quite literally "the last vote on a player before the player is eliminated"
in this specific phase, we have 9 players alive. so if at any point during the day phase 5 people vote the same player, that player is hanged. if deadline passes, it will only take 4 people to vote the same player to get that player out. after 24 hours it will only take 3 people. this goes on until a player is eliminated.
post_canonical:

post_rendered:
sweetbird108 wrote:
whats anit-spew and whats spew

spew is like the posts that a mafia member made, typically after they died/are known to be mafia. Reading spew is going back through a mafia member's posts after they died to try to figure out the alignments of other people in the game based on how the dead mafia interacted with them/read them/etc.

anti-spew is making posts that mainly try to hide who your mafia partner is, typically we think of this as happening when somebody is highly likely to die for one reason or another

kind of lackluster explanation

anyhow i think goldenjammer is possibly a hit but that feels underwhelming

The events of the previous night had most of the remaining members of the pi conference on edge. The way that one of their own had been forced out of the conference by such terrible means made them all afraid that they too would be faced with the same fate. post_rendered:
OKAY so. like i said before, my mind has already been made up. i don't think i will re-eval, so i'm going to just vote
it's incredibly hard for me to believe that ND actually had planned nearly the entire phase for me to "cure his paranoia" and that he had forced a confident wolfread on me last phase. i don't think i can believe he was doing this the entire time. i don't think that his attention was actually on that, despite his reasoning for it being pretty clear.

but v!ND should have wolfread me to some extent as he was making those posts and supposedly planning all of this to cure his paranoia... but surely real paranoia wouldn't be cured so easily. he came into f3 extremely confident that I was town just based off of the nightkill, even though he bounced around for the last... 2 phases? on my alignment. i think that he came into day knowing that i was town, so it was easy for him to make that vote. i said that i wanted to snap him as soon as we walked into f3 because i was expecting w!him to go on golden almost immediately, and that's what he did.

if ND is town and he actually did find me town so easily, gg, you're the goat for finding me, sorry that i couldn't find you back. but my own paranoia is very hard to cure, note that previously hypersock kept insisting that it could just be golden and i kept expressing paranoia on ND. by then i was the only one actually pushing ND for ??? reasons. i can't let go of paranoia easily, so it's hard for me to believe that others can let it go that quickly in a phase as important as f3.

another point that i considered was that ND was perfectly okay with me going over. day 1. with basically an omgus read? iirc, i think he only voted me and said he wanted me to go over after i voted him? i recall being confused in d1 though with all the mech stuff, meh. after noting that me/ad/violet were the people pushing threadstate in a productive manner. obviously i can't just wolfread people for wanting to push me out d1, but it felt strangely opportunistic for me, unfortunately.

and another rather minor point for me was that his "yay i was right" felt performative
confirmation bias, probably

i just dont think the k!lls were made by golden. admittedly i actually have not really tried to read golden's posts because i have found them basically unreadable because of lack of good content and i think that his thoughts are real. his hesitation in f3 feels real. if it isn't, gg

i'm sorry about leading so many wagons on villagers and tearing apart the poe that we had that would have led us to a win. you guys are awesome and violet you genuinely are the goat with your pr skills, i'm sorry for not following the poe you had. sweetbird i'm sorry for misleading you, i was worried that you would actually think i was the pr but i kept going. that's my bad.

and hypersock i could genuinely see your effort in the game and i appreciate you coming over to solve with me. it was fun masoning with you in f4, even if there were moments when i doubted that you were town. everyone else did very well as well

ND regardless of your alignment i think you played really well, if you're town i'm sorry for giving into my paranoia, i briefly found you town previously but then i drifted out of it. your play regarding the forcing the no hang and trying to bait w!me away from k!lling hypersock was pretty cool, regardless of your alignment. you're very fun to play with and i'd love to play with you again

Vote: NDMath


if i vote wrong we'll have two town losses today! will aops beat the allegations?

The pi conference entered its final day and the remaining attendees gathered to figure out what should be done. The chaos from the numerous scandals was rocking the mathematical community, and there needed to be firm statement put out by the conference to settle the disputes once and for all and determine how we should be talking about pi. As it now became clear that the fate of the conference would be decided this very day, the mood was quite tense as the discussion progressed.

BananaBall00 tried to get everyone on track to discuss what to do, but Goldenjammer741 seemed quite distracted and disengaged. As midday passed, they declared that they were getting tired and they just wanted things to be over with and they wanted to leave. Hearing this, BananaBall00 panicked and realized things had to be wrapped up quickly. After prodding Goldenjammer741 to vote, BananaBall00 joined in the motion to expel NDMath from the conference. NDMath was a 4 (Mafia Roleblocker)

With those who sought to disrupt the conference removed, the conference was soon able to decide upon a draft to be promulgated to everyone, explaining that all should be able to enjoy pi and engage with mathematics. Math is meant to be shared, not limited to those who can determine the true exact values of things. All those who make a sincere effort can likewise contribute to the mathematics of pi, no matter if they held pi to be 22/7, 3.2, or even 3.

With the conclusion of the conference, everyone burst into applause as a new age of mathematics arrived.
